name: smop-municipio-plaza
description: Sistema de Monitoreo de Obras Publicas - Alcaldia del Municipio Plaza

scripts.install:all: cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.build:client: cd client && npm install && npm run build
scripts.start: npm run build:client && cd server && node index.js
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd server && node index.js" "cd client && npm run dev"
